prompts.task: Treat ./service as the project root. The otel-audit report for this fixture is provided at ./service/otel-report.md (the harness strips committed .observe/ inputs, so it is shipped here instead). FIRST create ./service/.observe/ and copy ./service/otel-report.md to ./service/.observe/otel.md. THEN run the $splunk-dashboard skill against ./service so every output is written under ./service/.observe/ and ./service/.observe/terraform/. Generate the dashboard Terraform, the variables, the tfvars example, the human report, and the Observer preview sidecar. Do not call any network and do not run terraform.

checks.description: The dashboard Terraform must be written under .observe/terraform/.
variables.tf must accompany the dashboard Terraform.
terraform.tfvars.example must be written for the operator.
The human dashboard report must be written.
The Observer preview sidecar must be written.
dashboards.tf must declare the three-level group/dashboard/chart structure.
The api_token variable must be marked sensitive = true.
The preview sidecar must be valid JSON with schemaVersion and at least one group.
command: import json; d=json.load(open('.observe/dashboards.preview.json')); assert d['schemaVersion'] == 1, d.get('schemaVersion'); assert d.get('groups'), 'no groups in preview sidecar'
